warnings: List has 64 cards after validation; trimmed to 60 for Modern.
results.summary: Transformed: Mana base improvement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~1.88.
results.why: This pass tightens the mana base by replacing excess basic [[Mountain]]s with fetchlands and a dual land package. [[Arid Mesa]], [[Scalding Tarn]], and [[Wooded Foothills]] improve color access and shuffle utility, while [[Sacred Foundry]] adds reliable dual-color coverage. The result is more consistent land selection for a focused Modern build.

raw.summary: Transformed: Mana base improvement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~1.88.
raw.plan: This pass tightens the mana base by replacing excess basic [[Mountain]]s with fetchlands and a dual land package. [[Arid Mesa]], [[Scalding Tarn]], and [[Wooded Foothills]] improve color access and shuffle utility, while [[Sacred Foundry]] adds reliable dual-color coverage. The result is more consistent land selection for a focused Modern build.
raw.why: This pass tightens the mana base by replacing excess basic [[Mountain]]s with fetchlands and a dual land package. [[Arid Mesa]], [[Scalding Tarn]], and [[Wooded Foothills]] improve color access and shuffle utility, while [[Sacred Foundry]] adds reliable dual-color coverage. The result is more consistent land selection for a focused Modern build.

added.arid mesa: [[Arid Mesa]] upgrades basic land slots into flexible access to key red or white sources.
added.scalding tarn: [[Scalding Tarn]] improves fetch-based color fixing while supporting cleaner land selection.
added.wooded foothills: [[Wooded Foothills]] adds more fetch consistency to find the right red-based source on time.
added.sacred foundry: [[Sacred Foundry]] gives the fetch package an efficient untapped red-white dual to find.

removed.mountain: [[Mountain]] was trimmed because too many basics reduce color flexibility compared with fetchable dual support.
